question.content: In the right-triangle paper-folding setup with angle ACB=90 deg, angle B=30 deg, and AC=1, perform the two folds shown. Find only the shorter valid value of segment A'D'. Answer format requirement: <expr>. Strictly forbidden: any extra text beyond this format.
